EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGridTransformation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control the dataset name for a grid-based transformation.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("B807845E-DA8A-11D3-9F60-00C04F6BDD7F")]
public interface IGridTransformation : IGeoTransformation, ITransformation

Properties

GridDatasetName

The name of a dataset containing gridded transformation values for a geographic area.

string GridDatasetName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

void GetSpatialReferences(out ISpatialReference from, out ISpatialReference to)

from ISpatialReference
to ISpatialReference

Load()

Makes the grid data available for transformation operations. Called automatically.

void Load()
